summary: No command injection, SQL injection, path traversal, or hardcoded secrets. User input is only used for string comparison (response.strip().lower()) against a hardcoded set of literals — no injection possible. The module has no file I/O, no network calls, no subprocesses. Minimal attack surface: 20 lines, single function, single print statement.

prompt_injection.note: User input never reaches LLM; only compared against string literals
